Name: Ra, the Deceiver
Effect: On Enter: Put Sekhmet, Lioness of Slaughter from your deck into your opponent’s hand. Draw 2 Humans from your deck.

Name: Sekhmet, Lioness of Slaughter
Effect: On Enter: Banish all Humans at this location.

Name: Hathor, Lady of the Red Beer
Effect: Ongoing: Sekhmet cannot be played if you control Hathor. Once per turn, play a Human from your hand for free.

Name: Thoth, Keeper of Secrets
Effect: On Enter: Your opponent discards Sekhmet if they hold her. Draw a card for each Human in your graveyard.

Name: Rebellious Human
Effect: On Enter: If Sekhmet is at this location, banish her instead of this Human.

Name: Loyal Servant
Effect: Ongoing: Sekhmet cannot banish this Human while you control a Deity. This Human costs 1 less Colorless to play.

Name: Shu, God of Air
Effect: Ongoing: Humans you control cannot be banished by Sekhmet. Sekhmet costs your opponent 1 additional Colorless to play.

Name: Tefnut, Goddess of Moisture
Effect: On Enter: Return Sekhmet from your opponent’s hand to your deck. Draw a Human from your deck.

Name: Drunken Human
Effect: On Enter: If Sekhmet is at this location, move her to your opponent’s graveyard. This Human costs 1 less Colorless to play.

Name: Geb, God of Earth
Effect: Ongoing: Humans you control gain +1 Power. Sekhmet cannot be played at this location.

Name: Desperate Survivor
Effect: On Enter: If Sekhmet is on the board, move her to an adjacent location. This Human costs 1 less Colorless to play.

Name: Anubis, Judge of the Dead
Effect: On Enter: Banish all Humans at Sekhmet’s location. Draw a card for each Human banished this way.

Name: Bastet, Protector of the Weak
Effect: Ongoing: Sekhmet cannot banish Humans at this location. Once per turn, play a Human from your hand for free.

Name: Osiris, Lord of Rebirth
Effect: On Enter: Return up to 2 Humans from your graveyard to your hand. If Sekhmet is on the board, banish her.

Name: Set, Instigator of Chaos
Effect: On Enter: Your opponent must reveal their hand. If they hold Sekhmet, they must play her if able.

Name: Maat, Goddess of Order
Effect: Ongoing: Sekhmet costs your opponent 2 additional Colorless to play. Once per turn, draw a Human from your deck.

Name: Isis, Mother of Magic
Effect: On Enter: Return Sekhmet from your opponent’s graveyard to your deck. Put a Human from your hand into play for free.

Name: Nile Priest
Effect: On Enter: If you control a Deity, move Sekhmet to your opponent’s graveyard. This Human costs 1 less Colorless to play.

Name: Ptah, Creator of Life
Effect: On Enter: Return target Human from your graveyard to your hand. If Sekhmet is on the board, banish her and draw a Human from your deck.

Name: Wadjet, Cobra Guardian
Effect: Ongoing: Sekhmet cannot banish Humans at this location. Once per turn, draw a Human from your deck.

Name: Hidden Child
Effect: Ongoing: Sekhmet cannot banish this Human. This Human costs 1 less Colorless to play.
